# Standard Variant Mapping — Current Exceptions

**Last generated:** 2026-06-20 (manual check; not yet generated by an automated ingestion run — see `SWU_Backlog.md` BL-29/BL-33)

A card appears here if and only if: it is a root in swuapi's variant graph (`variant_of_uuid: null`) but its own `variant_type` is not `"Standard"`. See [`SWU_Standard_Variant_Mapping_Spec.md`](SWU_Standard_Variant_Mapping_Spec.md) §6 for the full definition and philosophy — exceptions are flagged, not blocked from catalog inclusion, and are expected to resolve as swuapi reveals more data.

## Current exceptions (1)

| Set | Card # | Name | Subtitle | Variant Type | Notes |
|-----|--------|------|----------|---------------|-------|
| C26 | 3 | Zam Wesell | Not What She Seems | Convention Exclusive | C26 itself is an in-development preview set (no release date, 6 total cards as of last check). Likely previews a Standard printing not yet revealed in any future set. |
